text.message: I got a deal for you blue
I will leave the 10 ore open if you trade brick
Blue you chose bad on the first pick so cant feel bad for you
theres no need to feed bad for me lmao
i just cant believe im the first rob with a setup this bad
i offered oj wheat but he didnt accept
i dont produce good ore btw
u say that while having 3 devs lmao
yeah i agree its either me or black now
can do ore nb if u want
are u aiming for double play black? or nah
even if I take road I will loose it long term
didnt expect u to have 3 non tho
wanna do nb for nb black?
that way we can save knight for red
ngl u might just be on 8 black haha\
u didnt use ur dev since forever
no way i have 2 vps lol
